positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a fantastical forest scene at twilight. The central subject is a pair of intertwined, glowing mythical creatures—a stylized dragon and a woodland spirit—forming a protective archway. The setting is illuminated by bioluminescent flora and suspended fireflies, creating vibrant cyan, deep indigo, and emerald highlights against a crisp, dark background. The art style should be highly detailed neo-vintage botanical illustration meets Art Nouveau etching, with clean, distinct silhouettes and strong negative space. Focus on symmetrical balance, high contrast, and graphic readability suitable for apparel print. Use thick, clean linework and muted, rich color gradients.
negative: blur, text, watermark, low resolution, noise, grain, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, cartoon, 3d render, logo, signature, messy, cluttered background
